productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Digital Blue Dress
description: Style Note A cute dress for your little girl from Gini & Jony, crafted from the softest materials - so soft and airy that they'll make her love the summer! Product Details A layered dress with a white round neck short sleeved top inside. A strappy denim playsuit with a half buttoned placket, floral drawstring at the midriff, two patch pockets at the waist and bows at the hems Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
